title: T-009 — standard_costs + cost_approval_audit schema + immutability trigger (§6.4, §5.3, §11.2)
prompt:
# T-009 — standard_costs schema + immutability trigger + cost_approval_audit

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §6.4 standard_costs DDL (lines 291-334); §5.3 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature SHA-256 + immutability; §11.2 V-FIN-STD-01..08; §13.1 standard_cost.approved event hook; §6.2 cost_approval_audit immutable.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Drizzle migration + ORM entries for `standard_costs` (versioned, approval workflow) and `cost_approval_audit` (immutable), including the `prevent_approved_standard_cost_update()` trigger per §5.3, RLS via `app.current_org_id()`, partial index for active lookups, no-overlap exclusion constraint per (item_id, currency_id) for approved records.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0053_standard_costs.sql`:
   - `CREATE TABLE standard_costs` per PRD §6.4 DDL (lines 291-316): id, org_id, item_id FK→items, item_type, effective_from, effective_to NULL, material_cost/labor_cost/overhead_cost NUMERIC(15,4), total_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (sum) STORED, currency_id FK, uom DEFAULT 'KG', cost_basis CHECK IN (...), status CHECK IN ('draft','pending','approved','superseded','retired') DEFAULT 'draft', approved_by, approved_at, approval_signature_hash, approval_reason, created_by, created_at, retention_until GENERATED, ext_jsonb.
   - CHECK (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > effective_from) per V-FIN-STD-01.
   - Trigger function `prevent_approved_standard_cost_update()` per PRD §6.4 lines 319-334: blocks all UPDATE on status='approved' rows except setting effective_to (supersede path). RAISE EXCEPTION with PRD-cited message 'Cannot modify approved standard_cost record %. Use supersede path.'
   - Partial unique exclusion constraint: GIST btree_gist on `(org_id, item_id, currency_id) WITH = , (daterange(effective_from, COALESCE(effective_to, 'infinity'::date), '[)') WITH &&) WHERE status = 'approved'` — enforces V-FIN-STD-02 no-overlapping approved records.
   - Partial unique index `idx_standard_costs_lookup ON standard_costs (org_id, item_id, status, effective_from DESC) WHERE status='approved'` per PRD line 317.
   - RLS + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY via `app.current_org_id()`.
   - `CREATE TABLE cost_approval_audit` (id, org_id, standard_cost_id FK, transition TEXT, actor_id, transition_at, signature_hash, reason, before_jsonb, after_jsonb, retention_until). Immutability trigger blocks UPDATE / DELETE on the table (only INSERT allowed; archival job is allowed via a SECURITY DEFINER function gated by Foundation T-114 erasure registry).
2. Drizzle ORM: `packages/db/src/schema/standard-costs.ts`, `cost-approval-audit.ts` + register.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0053_standard_costs.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/standard-costs.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/cost-approval-audit.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/standard-costs-immutability.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/standard-costs-overlap.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given migration 0053 ran, when \d standard_costs inspected, then total_cost is STORED generated, status enum enforced, and trigger prevent_approved_standard_cost_update registered. AND given pg_policies on tables, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() (no GUC reads).
- Given an approved standard_cost A, when UPDATE A SET material_cost=X runs, then it fails with PRD-cited exception. AND given cost_approval_audit has a row, when UPDATE or DELETE attempted, then it fails (immutability trigger).
- Given an approved standard_cost A, when UPDATE A SET effective_to='2026-12-31' runs, then it succeeds.
- Given an approved record for item X GBP spanning 2026-01-01..NULL, when second overlapping approved record INSERTed, then exclusion constraint rejects (V-FIN-STD-02).
_(AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: standard-costs-immutability.test.ts asserts trigger blocks UPDATE except effective_to. standard-costs-overlap.test.ts asserts the GIST exclusion constraint.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test standard-costs-immutability standard-costs-overlap`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow UPDATE on cost_approval_audit (audit must be append-only per §5.3 + BRCGS 7y retention).
- Do not allow approved standard_costs UPDATEs beyond effective_to — material_cost/labor_cost/overhead_cost/status='approved' lock is hard.
- Do not use a CHECK constraint for no-overlap — only GIST EXCLUDE can enforce range overlap on partial subset (approved rows).
- Do not omit `btree_gist` extension creation (`CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS btree_gist`).
- Do not skip retention_until GENERATED column — BRCGS 7y is mandatory per §5.2.
- Do not weaken RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.

pipeline_inputs.description: standard_costs versioned schema + immutability trigger (21 CFR Part 11) + GIST exclusion for no-overlap approved records + cost_approval_audit append-only.
pipeline_inputs.details: Implements §6.4 DDL verbatim (renaming nothing). Trigger blocks UPDATE on approved rows except effective_to (supersede path). GIST EXCLUDE on daterange(effective_from, effective_to or 'infinity') WHERE status='approved' enforces V-FIN-STD-02 across overlapping date ranges. cost_approval_audit blocks UPDATE/DELETE via immutability trigger (only INSERT or SECURITY DEFINER archival per Foundation T-114 erasure registry). [AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

Given an approved standard_cost A, when UPDATE A SET effective_to='2026-12-31' runs, then it succeeds.
Given an approved record for item X GBP spanning 2026-01-01..NULL, when second overlapping approved record INSERTed, then exclusion constraint rejects (V-FIN-STD-02).

Do not skip retention_until GENERATED column.
